settings.eyebrow: GlobiSun Multimedia Corp. · B2B Art Supply Sourcing
settings.heading: Wholesale Art Supply Sourcing for Schools, Studios & Creative Buyers
settings.subheading: A California-based B2B supply portal for education programs, art studios, workshops, resellers, and creative teams that need bulk art materials, quote review, kit planning, and custom sourcing support.

settings.title: Available Product Lines
settings.description: Browse current products and contact us for bulk pricing, case-pack options, or custom sourcing support.

settings.heading: Request a wholesale quote or sourcing review.
settings.intro: Send product category, expected quantity, delivery ZIP code, timeline, and intended use. Clear details help us review pricing, packaging, lead time, and substitutions faster.

settings.heading: A quote-based supply portal, not just a product grid.
settings.intro: GlobiSun is structured for organizations that need product planning, bulk quantities, and professional communication before checkout. This makes the site more useful for schools, studios, resellers, supplier discussions, and documentation-heavy purchasing.

settings.heading: Four practical ways buyers can use GlobiSun.
settings.intro: These are buyer pathways that help schools, studios, resellers, and creative teams explain what they need before a quote.

settings.heading: Built for buyers who need planning before checkout.
settings.intro: GlobiSun is positioned around B2B purchasing conversations: product fit, quantity, timeline, delivery requirements, and practical alternatives.

settings.heading: A cleaner bridge between suppliers, creative buyers, and U.S. purchasing needs.
settings.intro: GlobiSun presents a professional front for product sourcing, supplier conversations, and quote-based purchasing requests tied to art education, creative retail, studios, and multimedia projects.

settings.heading: Common wholesale questions.
settings.intro: Clear answers help buyers understand quotes, sourcing, kits, and documentation before they submit an inquiry.

settings.heading: Useful purchasing pages before you request a quote.
settings.intro: These pages make the site feel more complete for B2B buyers, suppliers, banks, and documentation-heavy conversations.

settings.heading: Four practical ways to use GlobiSun.
settings.intro: A cleaner path helps visitors understand whether they should browse products, request a kit, ask for custom sourcing, or discuss reseller quantities.

settings.heading: A more professional purchasing experience for creative supply needs.
settings.intro: Every section of the site is built to make the business easier to understand for buyers, suppliers, banks, and documentation-heavy conversations.

settings.heading: A better request gets a better B2B response.
settings.intro: The fastest way to receive a useful quote is to send a clear purchasing brief. GlobiSun reviews requests by product fit, quantity, supplier availability, delivery feasibility, and timeline.

settings.heading: Start from the buying need, not only the product name.
settings.intro: B2B buyers often begin with a program, class, inventory plan, or resale goal. Use this index to choose the best path before requesting a quote.

settings.heading: From catalog interest to a practical purchasing conversation.
settings.intro: The goal is to move buyers from browsing into a structured conversation about product fit, quantity, delivery, timing, and documentation.

settings.heading: A clear request makes bulk pricing and sourcing review easier.
settings.intro: Tell us the category, quantity, budget range, ZIP code, timeline, and whether substitutes are acceptable. This gives GlobiSun enough context to review realistic next steps.

settings.heading: A wholesale-first site that explains what GlobiSun does before a buyer asks for pricing.
settings.intro: GlobiSun guides visitors through product discovery, procurement brief preparation, custom sourcing, and quote review so buyers and suppliers can understand the business model quickly.

settings.heading: Built around the questions serious buyers actually ask.
settings.intro: Instead of pushing one-click retail checkout, GlobiSun frames the conversation around MOQ, case pack, delivery ZIP code, order timing, substitutes, and use case.

settings.heading: A clear wholesale inquiry path for buyers who need quantity, timing, and sourcing reviewed.
A professional procurement identity for creative supply buyers.
settings.intro: GlobiSun helps buyers turn product interest into a clear B2B purchasing conversation: what is needed, how much is needed, where it is going, when it is needed, and whether substitutes or kit formats are acceptable.

settings.title: Structured quote workflow
settings.text: A clear route from product reference to quantity review, case-pack discussion, delivery feasibility, and order next steps.

settings.title: Product lines as buying references
settings.text: The catalog helps buyers identify categories and specifications before requesting bulk pricing or related sourcing.

settings.title: Custom supply support
settings.text: If a listed item is not the exact fit, GlobiSun can review adjacent products, substitutes, bundles, and kit-friendly formats.

settings.heading: Start with the request path that matches your buying situation.
settings.intro: A focused request helps GlobiSun review the right category, quantity logic, substitutions, and delivery feasibility faster.

settings.title: I know the item or category
settings.text: Send product reference, desired quantity, ZIP code, and timeline. This is the fastest route for quote review.

settings.title: I need supplies for a class or workshop
settings.text: Send class size, age range, session length, materials needed, budget, and deadline.

settings.title: I am testing inventory for resale
settings.text: Send target categories, quantity range, and whether mixed SKUs or substitutes are acceptable.

settings.title: I need sourcing guidance
settings.text: Send your use case, budget, and examples. We can help narrow the sourcing direction.

settings.heading: B2B art supplies for education, studios, resellers, and creative programs.
settings.body: GlobiSun supports wholesale art supply inquiries for schools, art studios, workshop organizers, small retailers, and creative production teams. Buyers can use the catalog as a product reference, prepare a procurement brief, and contact us for quote-based review involving quantity, delivery ZIP code, timeline, product fit, and custom sourcing needs.

settings.heading: $500 starting point for efficient B2B sourcing.
settings.intro: GlobiSun currently supports wholesale and sourcing orders starting at $500 USD before shipping and taxes. This minimum helps keep overseas freight, carton weight, packaging, supplier coordination, and bulk handling costs practical.
settings.minimum_text: Recommended starting point for wholesale quote review before final shipping, taxes, and supplier confirmation.
settings.note: Not sure whether your request fits? Submit product category, estimated quantity, budget range, ZIP code, and timeline for review.
